data.title: Epic Homes launches $1,000 Trades Scholarship for local students in Maple Ridge, BC, aiming to support skilled youth.
data.description: In Maple Ridge, British Columbia, Epic Homes, a construction company with a 20-year history of constructing close to 1,000 homes, recognizes the significance of skilled individuals in fostering robust communities in addition to providing housing. This ethos is fundamental to Epic Homes’ mission of Making Things Better, prompting them to introduce the Epic Homes Youth Trades Scholarship in 2026. This scholarship aims to support local high school students, specifically those from Maple Ridge Secondary, Samuel Robertson Technical, or Gar, by awarding $1,000 to three deserving recipients.

data.title: Inventor from Ridgeland, Miss creates protective screen for jet engines to prevent bird strikes and debris.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 13, 2026, an inventor from Ridgeland, Mississippi expressed concerns about the vulnerability of jet engines to bird strikes and debris. The inventor highlighted the lack of protection to prevent these incidents which can lead to engine failure. As a result, they created a solution called "THE". This invention aims to address the issue and provide safeguarding measures for jet engines. The inventor's innovation is intended to enhance the safety and efficiency of aircraft operations by minimizing the risks posed by bird strikes and debris.

data.title: Jan issue of Journal of Cardiac Failure features innovative strategies to improve outcomes; includes novel approach to remove fluid through skin & prevent right ventricular failure after LVAD implantation.
data.description: In the January 2026 issue of the Journal of Cardiac Failure (JCF), significant advancements were reported including a unique method for eliminating extra fluid through the skin and a fresh approach to averting right ventricular failure post LVAD surgery. These developments are crucial in improving patient outcomes.

data.title: Concirrus market US expansion in 2025 with record revenues driven by demand for AI underwriting solutions.
data.description: In London and New York on January 13, 2026, Concirrus announced the conclusion of 2025 as its most successful year to date. The company achieved record revenues, attributing this growth to the increasing popularity of AI-focused underwriting solutions in specialty insurance markets worldwide. They shared that their year-on-year performance has been impressive, showcasing significant progress in the industry.

data.title: Kraken-associated SPAC plans $250M public offering in the US.
data.description: A recently established blank check company called KRAKacquisition Corp., associated with the popular cryptocurrency exchange Kraken, has put forth a plan for a public offering amounting to $250 million.

data.title: TBX releases 2026 GA maintenance survey with 600+ responses from shops and operators, insights into industry trends.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio on January 13, 2026, TBX released its 2026 TBX Annual Survey, providing key insights into the general aviation maintenance sector. With over 600 responses from maintenance facilities and operators across the country, the survey offers a comprehensive view of the industry.

data.title: KBW 2026 (Korea Blockchain Week) will be held in Seoul from Sep 29-Oct 1, 2026. Upbit joins as main sponsor.
data.description: Returning to Seoul from September 29 to October 1, 2026, KBW 2026 (Korea Blockchain Week) is gearing up for its most ambitious edition yet. FactBlock will host the event, with Upbit, Korea's top digital asset exchange, joining as the Main sponsor.

data.title: BottleRock Napa Valley 2026 lineup announced with over 80 acts including Foo Fighters, Backstreet Boys, Lorde, Teddy Swims, LCD Soundsystem, and SOMBR. Fest dates: May 22-24. Tickets on sale Jan 14 at 10am PT.
data.description: The lineup for BottleRock Napa Valley festival in 2026 will include more than 80 musical acts, with headliners such as Foo Fighters, Backstreet Boys, Lorde, Teddy Swims, LCD Soundsystem, and SOMBR. The 3-day event, which combines music with wine, craft beer, and culinary experiences, is set to take place in the City of Napa at the Napa Valley Expo from May 22 to 24, 2026. Tickets for the festival will go on sale on January 14 at 10am PT. BottleRock Napa Valley offers a diverse range of music genres along with fine wines, craft beers, and regional cuisine.

data.title: Tiger Pistol's new playbook outlines strategies for pizza franchises to boost growth through local marketing.
data.description: New marketing playbook titled "Slices of Influence: The Pizza Franchise Marketing Playbook" provides Quick Service Restaurant (QSR) Marketers with step-by-step guidance on transforming national campaigns into local success stories. Released on January 13, 2026, in Cleveland, this resource is designed to assist in localizing marketing strategies for maximum impact. Tiger Pistol, known as the leading local advertising platform, is the provider behind this resource, streamlining and simplifying the process for marketers.

data.title: YZi Labs, led by CZ, to invest 8-figure sum in trading terminal amid rise of DeFi execution prioritization in crypto space.
data.description: An investment of tens of millions of dollars in Genius Trading showcases the increasing importance of tools that prioritize execution as cryptocurrency trading expands to various blockchains.

data.title: Why stablecoins are preferred over Bitcoin for salaries due to regulation, compliance, volatility, and payroll rules.
data.description: Regulatory bodies are increasingly favoring stablecoins over Bitcoin for salary payments due to concerns regarding compliance, volatility, and payroll regulations. Stablecoins are digital assets pegged to a stable asset like the US dollar, making them less prone to price fluctuations. This stability is especially attractive for employers looking to pay their employees in cryptocurrencies. The global adoption of crypto wages is being influenced by the need for regulatory compliance and adherence to established payroll rules. These factors are driving the preference for stablecoins in salary payments, with Bitcoin facing challenges due to its price volatility and regulatory uncertainties. As a result, stablecoins are emerging as a more favorable option for businesses looking to incorporate cryptocurrencies into their payroll systems.

data.title: BTC-gold correlation suggests potential 50% price increase by March. Predictions hint at BTC reaching $144,000 in 2026.
data.description: In 2026, there is a possibility that Bitcoin could surpass gold in value, with projections indicating a potential rally that may drive the price of BTC up to $144,000. This is attributed to factors such as liquidity expansion and cycle fractals aligning in favor of Bitcoin's valuation.

data.title: Georgia judge denies Teva's request to delay trial in lawsuits over Paragard IUD fracturing. 3,800 lawsuits centralized. Trial set for January 20.
data.description: A federal judge in Georgia has refused Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd.'s (NYSE: TEVA) plea to postpone the initial trial among thousands of lawsuits alleging that its Paragard intrauterine device (IUD) is prone to fracturing during removal. Paragard is a copper-based non-hormonal contraceptive implanted for long-term use. U.S. District Judge Leigh Martin May, overseeing the consolidated federal litigation, has decreed that the trial will take place on January 20 as planned. Teva had sought a hold on the proceedings while appealing a prior ruling dismissing their bid to dismiss the claims. The company believed a successful appeal could terminate the litigation, which encompasses approximately 3,800 centralized federal suits. Plaintiffs argued that the request aimed at delaying proceedings and needlessly prolonging the case. The upcoming trial will act as the initial "bellwether" event in...

data.title: Codenotary receives U.S. patent for cryptographic proof technology, enhancing data integrity verification for enterprise.
data.description: In Houston, Codenotary, a prominent company in software supply chain protection, has recently secured a patent for a method to validate data integrity on a large scale. This innovative technique enhances the speed and effectiveness of confirming data integrity for enterprises. It serves as the basis for the company's software supply chain protection offerings. Businesses can now efficiently authenticate their software, build artifacts, and confidential information on a broader scale.
